text: - **`src/cli/mcp/tools.rs`**: `call()` and every RPC-building function (`who`, `chat_read`, `chat_write`, `channels_create`, `channel_mutation`, `daemon_identity`) now take `client_info_name: Option<&str>` and merge it into the outgoing daemon params as `"client_info_name"` via a new `with_client_info` helper — sitting alongside the existing `pty_session`/`harness`/`agent` envelope fields.
